MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Robert Galliani is present. Represented by Rick Galliani.
Attorney David Foran appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Rolando Javier is present.
Attorney Margaret Allen representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of SEP-24-2012 is vacated.
